bundles.title: CoCo Foundations lab files
bundles.note: The Snowflake guide links to GitHub assets in Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts that are temporarily unavailable. Download these files here instead of the guide's repo links.

groups.title: Lab setup (run in Snowsight before demos)

files.name: 00_snowday_setup.sql
files.help: Run first as SYSADMIN — creates COCO_WORKSHOP database, schemas, and warehouse.

files.name: 00_sample_data.sql
files.help: Run after setup — loads AP invoice source tables and evaluation data.

files.name: 01_demo_reset.sql
files.help: Optional — drop demo objects and re-run the setup scripts above.

groups.title: Demo 2 — PRD sample files (save locally for CoCo)

files.name: sample_business_requirements_source_onboarding.csv
files.help: New source systems, owners, and go-live targets.

files.name: sample_business_requirements_column_mapping.csv
files.help: Field-level mappings for new sources into the Silver schema.

files.name: sample_business_requirements_business_rules.csv
files.help: Business rules BR-001 through BR-010 for the PRD workflow.

bundles.title: From Zero to Agents lab files
bundles.note: The Snowflake guide links to setup.sql and marketing_data.csv in Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts that are temporarily unavailable. Download them here instead.

files.name: setup.sql
files.help: Run in a Snowsight SQL worksheet — creates roles, warehouse, database, and loads sample data.

files.name: marketing_data.csv
files.help: Upload via Database Explorer when the guide reaches the Updating Marketing Data step.

bundles.title: Dynamic Tables lab files
bundles.note: The Snowflake guide links to setup.sql in Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts that is temporarily unavailable. Copy the script below into Snowsight or download it here.

groups.title: Lab setup (run in Snowsight before the pipeline steps)

files.name: setup.sql
files.help: Run as ACCOUNTADMIN — creates warehouses, databases, UDTFs, and sample CUSTOMERS / PRODUCTS / ORDERS tables.

bundles.workshop_match: Building AI Applications with Snowflake Cortex
bundles.title: RAG, Text-to-SQL & CoCo lab files
bundles.note: The Snowflake guide links to a workshop notebook in Snowflake-Labs/sfquickstarts that is temporarily unavailable. Download the notebook here and upload it in Snowsight under Projects > Workspaces.

files.name: accelerate-app-dev-cortex-code.ipynb
files.help: Upload in Snowsight: Projects > Workspaces > + Add new > Upload files.
